channel.title: BC forest comment alerts: Vancouver Island
channel.description: Forest Operations Map blocks with an open public comment period around Port Renfrew, Lake Cowichan, Nitinat, Alberni Valley, Sooke, Campbell River, and Gold River. Built from BC public open data.

item.title: Alberni Valley: block 171128 closes 2026-07-24
item.description: Franklin River. Planned 2026-06-16. near a fish record. Comment closes 2026-07-24. Area: Alberni Valley.

item.title: Alberni Valley: block 171130 closes 2026-07-24
item.description: Franklin River. Planned 2026-06-16. proposed for logging. Comment closes 2026-07-24. Area: Alberni Valley.

item.title: Alberni Valley: block 073322 closes 2026-07-24
item.description: Corrigan Creek. Planned 2026-06-15. proposed for logging. Comment closes 2026-07-24. Area: Alberni Valley.

item.title: Alberni Valley: block 171127 closes 2026-07-24
item.description: Franklin River. Planned 2026-06-16. proposed for logging. Comment closes 2026-07-24. Area: Alberni Valley.

item.title: Nitinat: block 961214 closes 2026-07-24
item.description: Sarita River. Planned 2026-08-15. proposed for logging. Comment closes 2026-07-24. Area: Nitinat.

item.title: Alberni Valley: block HAN012 closes 2026-07-31
item.description: Tsap'it. Planned 2026-08-17. proposed for logging. Comment closes 2026-07-31. Area: Alberni Valley.
